name: Amazon Transit Gateway
description: Schema representing an Amazon Transit Gateway resource.

properties.name: TransitGatewayId
properties.description: The ID of the transit gateway.

properties.name: TransitGatewayArn
properties.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transit gateway.

properties.name: State
properties.description: The state of the transit gateway.

properties.name: OwnerId
properties.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the transit gateway.

properties.name: Description
properties.description: The description of the transit gateway.

properties.name: CreationTime
properties.description: The creation date and time of the transit gateway.

properties.name: Tags
properties.description: The tags assigned to the transit gateway.
